title: Do Not Take Your Profits On Globe Life, Even At Its All-Time Highs
text: Globe Life has consistently outperformed the market and offers reliable growth. The company has a strong business model, with consistent earnings growth and a robust performance record. Globe Life is trading at only 10.3 times its expected earnings in 2024.

title: GLOBE LIFE INC. DECLARES DIVIDEND
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $.2250 per share on all of the outstanding common stock of the Company held of record as of close of business of the Company's transfer agent on January 5, 2024. The dividend will be paid on February 1, 2024.
